requirements.text: WHEN PathSelector receives API response from /api/projects/{id}/config, the system shall read document paths from data.config.project.document.paths
WHEN /api/documents endpoint is called with valid projectId having configured document paths, the system shall return 200 status with document tree (not 404)
WHEN ConfigRepository._parseConfig() reads a TOML file with [project.document] table, the system shall populate documentPaths from parsed.project.document.paths

scenarios.title: ConfigRepository reads paths from project.document TOML table
scenarios.given: TOML config contains [project.document] table with paths = ["docs", "CLAUDE.md"]

scenarios.title: PathSelector reads paths from API response at correct path
scenarios.given: API /api/projects/{id}/config returns { config: { project: { document: { paths: ["docs"] } } } }
scenarios.when: PathSelector component receives the API response
scenarios.then: paths shall be read from data.config.project.document.paths and checkboxes pre-selected

scenarios.title: Documents API returns 200 with document tree
scenarios.then: response shall be 200 status with document tree array (not 404)

scenarios.title: Path selection persists after save and reopen
scenarios.given: User opens PathSelector modal with configured paths
scenarios.when: User unchecks a path, saves, and reopens the modal
scenarios.then: the checkbox shall remain in the unchecked state (change persisted)

obligations.title: PathSelector must read paths from data.config.project.document.paths
Documents API must return 200 with tree when paths configured correctly
ConfigRepository must read paths from project.document.paths (no legacy fallback)

testPlans.title: PathSelector reads paths from correct API response path
Documents API returns 200 with tree when paths configured
Path selection persists after save and reopen

tasks.title: Fix PathSelector to read from correct API path
